fields.name: General Journal Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the general journal template that is used for this workflow step argument.

fields.name: General Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the general journal batch that is used for this workflow step argument.

fields.name: Notification User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user that will be notified in connection with this workflow step argument.

fields.name: Notify Sender
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the approval sender will be notified in connection with this workflow step argument.

fields.name: Link Target Page
fields.tooltip: Specifies a specific page that opens when a user chooses the link in a notification. If you do not fill this field, the page showing the involved record will open. The page must have the same source table as the record involved.

fields.name: Custom Link
fields.tooltip: Specifies a link that is inserted in the notification to link to a custom location.

fields.name: Approver Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies who is notified first about approval requests.

fields.name: Approver Limit Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies how approvers' approval limits affect when approval request entries are created for them. A qualified approver is an approver whose approval limit is above the value on the approval request.

fields.name: Workflow User Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the workflow user group that is used in connection with this workflow step argument.

fields.name: Due Date Formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies in how many days the approval request must be resolved from the date when it was sent.

fields.name: Message
fields.tooltip: Specifies the message that will be shown as a response.

fields.name: Delegate After
fields.tooltip: Specifies if and when an approval request will automatically be delegated to the relevant substitute. You can select to automatically delegate one, two, or five days after the date when the approval was requested.

fields.name: Show Confirmation Message
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a confirmation message is shown to users after they request an approval.

fields.name: Response Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the response type for the workflow response. You cannot set options for this.

fields.name: Response User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user necessary for an acceptable response.

fields.name: Notification Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the notification.
